item.title: The Manifesto House: Buildings That Changed the Future of Architecture, Owen Hop...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (6 medier)

@saintlaurentbabylone

The Manifesto House: Buildings That Changed the Future of Architecture, Owen Hopkins⁣
Yale University Press, 2025⁣
Book curation by Anthony Vaccarello⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣
⁣
The Manifesto House examines twenty-one “manifesto houses” that broke with tradition to embody new architectural theories and ambitions. Owen Hopkins explores designs by Andrea Palladio, Eileen Gray, Frank Lloyd Wright, Lina Bo Bardi, Sou Fujimoto, and others, analyzing how these visionary homes challenged norms and influenced the future of architecture. The book combines historical insight with detailed visual documentation to reveal the enduring impact of radical residential design.⁣
⁣
⁣⁣⁣⁣‍Available at Saint Laurent Babylone⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣
9 rue de Grenelle, Paris⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣
#YSL #SaintLaurentBabylone #SLRD #SLEditions⁣
@ysl⁣
@anthonyvaccarello

Se slideshow på Instagram

@saintlaurentbabylone

The Manifesto House: Buildings That Changed the Future of Architecture, Owen Hopkins⁣
Yale University Press, 2025⁣
Book curation by Anthony Vaccarello⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣
⁣
The Manifesto House examines twenty-one “manifesto houses” that broke with tradition to embody new architectural theories and ambitions. Owen Hopkins explores designs by Andrea Palladio, Eileen Gray, Frank Lloyd Wright, Lina Bo Bardi, Sou Fujimoto, and others, analyzing how these visionary homes challenged norms and influenced the future of architecture. The book combines historical insight with detailed visual documentation to reveal the enduring impact of radical residential design.⁣
⁣
⁣⁣⁣⁣‍Available at Saint Laurent Babylone⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣
9 rue de Grenelle, Paris⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣

item.title: The Entertainers, Richard Prince⁣ Fulton Ryder, 2023⁣ Book curation by Anthony V...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (5 medier)

@saintlaurentbabylone

The Entertainers, Richard Prince⁣
Fulton Ryder, 2023⁣
Book curation by Anthony Vaccarello⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣
⁣
The Entertainers revisits rarely seen works by Richard Prince from his “Time Life” years around the theaters, bars, and grind houses of 42nd Street and Times Square. Combining early portraits, advertisements, and finely rendered drawings, the book captures fleeting celebrity, pop culture, and urban spectacle, revealing Prince’s fascination with identity, performance, and perception in everyday life.⁣
⁣
⁣⁣⁣⁣‍Available at Saint Laurent Babylone⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣
9 rue de Grenelle, Paris⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣
#YSL #SaintLaurentBabylone #SLRD #SLEditions⁣
@ysl⁣
@anthonyvaccarello

Se slideshow på Instagram

@saintlaurentbabylone

The Entertainers, Richard Prince⁣
Fulton Ryder, 2023⁣
Book curation by Anthony Vaccarello⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣
⁣
The Entertainers revisits rarely seen works by Richard Prince from his “Time Life” years around the theaters, bars, and grind houses of 42nd Street and Times Square. Combining early portraits, advertisements, and finely rendered drawings, the book captures fleeting celebrity, pop culture, and urban spectacle, revealing Prince’s fascination with identity, performance, and perception in everyday life.⁣
⁣

item.title: Swedish Ecstasy: Art, Faith, and Visionary Experience in Sweden, various artists...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (7 medier)

@saintlaurentbabylone

Swedish Ecstasy: Art, Faith, and Visionary Experience in Sweden, various artists⁣
Yale University Press, 2024⁣
Book curation by Anthony Vaccarello⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣
⁣
Swedish Ecstasy explores the visionary world surrounding Hilma af Klint and her artistic circle at the turn of the twentieth century. Bringing together essays and artworks, the book examines how mysticism, spirituality, and scientific thought shaped a generation of Swedish artists. It also highlights the lasting influence of these esoteric ideas on contemporary artistic practices.⁣
⁣
⁣⁣⁣⁣‍Available at Saint Laurent Babylone⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣
9 rue de Grenelle, Paris⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣
#YSL #SaintLaurentBabylone #SLRD #SLEditions⁣
@ysl⁣
@anthonyvaccarello

Se slideshow på Instagram

🖼️ Slideshow (7 medier)

@saintlaurentbabylone

Swedish Ecstasy: Art, Faith, and Visionary Experience in Sweden, various artists⁣
Yale University Press, 2024⁣
Book curation by Anthony Vaccarello⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣
⁣
Swedish Ecstasy explores the visionary world surrounding Hilma af Klint and her artistic circle at the turn of the twentieth century. Bringing together essays and artworks, the book examines how mysticism, spirituality, and scientific thought shaped a generation of Swedish artists. It also highlights the lasting influence of these esoteric ideas on contemporary artistic practices.⁣
⁣
⁣⁣⁣⁣‍Available at Saint Laurent Babylone⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣
9 rue de Grenelle, Paris⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣

item.title: Mies van der Rohe: An Architect in His Time, Dietrich Neumann⁣ Yale University P...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (8 medier)

@saintlaurentbabylone

Mies van der Rohe: An Architect in His Time, Dietrich Neumann⁣
Yale University Press, 2024⁣
Book curation by Anthony Vaccarello⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣
⁣
This comprehensive study offers a deeply researched account of the life and career of Ludwig Mies van der Rohe, one of the most influential architects of the twentieth century. Through archival sources and historical analysis, Dietrich Neumann revisits Mies’s iconic projects, from the Farnsworth House to the Seagram Building, while placing his work within its social, political, and architectural context. ⁣
⁣
⁣⁣⁣⁣‍Available at Saint Laurent Babylone⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣
9 rue de Grenelle, Paris⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣⁣
#YSL #SaintLaurentBabylone #SLRD #SLEditions⁣
@ysl⁣
@anthonyvaccarello

Se slideshow på Instagram

Yale University Press, 2024⁣

⁣
This comprehensive study offers a deeply researched account of the life and career of Ludwig Mies van der Rohe, one of the most influential architects of the twentieth century. Through archival sources and historical analysis, Dietrich Neumann revisits Mies’s iconic projects, from the Farnsworth House to the Seagram Building, while placing his work within its social, political, and architectural context. ⁣
